item.text: {"id":"urn:kernel-v0:wrong","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":false,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The admitted deontic flattening captures anticipated harm and aversion but not the criterial normative prohibition distinguishing wrong from merely dangerous or unwanted; add an explicit should-not/prohibition clause to the gloss and rendering."}
